name: wd
description: Warp to directories without using cd

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Adds the current working directory to your warp points

args.name: point
args.description: Name of the warp point to be created

args.name: point
args.description: Name of the warp point to be removed

subcommands.name: show
subcommands.description: Print path to given warp point

subcommands.name: ls
subcommands.description: Show files from given warp point (ls)

subcommands.name: path
subcommands.description: Show the path to given warp point (pwd)

subcommands.name: clean
subcommands.description: Remove points warping to nonexistent directories (will prompt unless --force is used)

options.description: Exit after execution with exit codes (for testing)
Allows overwriting without warning (for add & clean)

args.name: point
args.description: Warp point to the specified directory
